service_metadata.title: Contract Risk Scanner - Analysis Engine
service_metadata.description: AI analysis service for contract risk extraction and role-focused summary.

empty_text_placeholder.ru: Текст документа пуст после этапа ingestion.
empty_text_placeholder.en: Document text is empty after ingestion stage.
empty_text_placeholder.it: Il testo del documento e vuoto dopo la fase di ingestion.
empty_text_placeholder.fr: Le texte du document est vide apres l'etape d'ingestion.

invalid_content_source.en: Either document_text or document_base64 must be provided
invalid_content_source.it: E necessario fornire document_text oppure document_base64
invalid_content_source.fr: Il faut fournir document_text ou document_base64

document_text_too_long.it: Il testo del documento supera il limite configurato
document_text_too_long.fr: Le texte du document depasse la limite configuree

document_base64_too_long.it: La dimensione di document_base64 supera il limite configurato
document_base64_too_long.fr: La taille de document_base64 depasse la limite configuree

document_text.ru: Текст уже передан в request, поэтому используется облегченный local-first маршрут без обязательного offload.
document_text.en: Request already contains extracted text, so the lightweight local-first route is used without mandatory offload.
document_text.it: La richiesta contiene gia il testo estratto, quindi viene usato il percorso leggero local-first senza offload obbligatorio.
document_text.fr: La requete contient deja le texte extrait, donc le parcours leger local-first est utilise sans offload obligatoire.

document_base64.ru: Для бинарного документа допускается server-assisted маршрут, чтобы не требовать тяжелые AI-ассеты на устройстве по умолчанию.
document_base64.en: Binary document input may use a server-assisted route so the default device build does not require heavy AI assets.
document_base64.it: Per un documento binario e consentito un percorso assistito dal server per evitare asset AI pesanti nella build device predefinita.
document_base64.fr: Pour un document binaire, un parcours assiste par serveur est autorise afin d'eviter des assets IA lourds dans la build par defaut.

mime_type_override.ru: Mime type документа перевел задачу в более безопасный lightweight/offload режим согласно policy.
mime_type_override.en: The document mime type switched the job into the safer lightweight/offload mode according to policy.
mime_type_override.it: Il mime type del documento ha spostato il job nel modo lightweight/offload piu sicuro secondo la policy.
mime_type_override.fr: Le type mime du document a bascule le job vers le mode lightweight/offload le plus sur selon la politique.

contract_brief.ru: Договор '{document_name}' обработан конфигурируемым пайплайном. Обнаружено {clauses_count} пунктов. Фокус анализа по роли '{role}'.
contract_brief.en: Contract '{document_name}' was processed by configurable pipeline. {clauses_count} clauses were detected. Analysis is focused on role '{role}'.
contract_brief.it: Il contratto '{document_name}' e stato elaborato dal pipeline configurabile. Sono state rilevate {clauses_count} clausole. L'analisi e focalizzata sul ruolo '{role}'.
contract_brief.fr: Le contrat '{document_name}' a ete traite par un pipeline configurable. {clauses_count} clauses ont ete detectees. L'analyse est axee sur le role '{role}'.

role_mentioned.en: This risk may directly affect role '{role}'.
role_mentioned.it: Questo rischio puo influire direttamente sul ruolo '{role}'.
role_mentioned.fr: Ce risque peut affecter directement le role '{role}'.

role_generic.ru: Общий риск договора, релевантный для роли '{role}'.
role_generic.en: General contract risk relevant for role '{role}'.
role_generic.it: Rischio contrattuale generale rilevante per il ruolo '{role}'.
role_generic.fr: Risque contractuel general pertinent pour le role '{role}'.

description.ru: Обнаружен пункт о штрафах или санкциях.
description.en: A penalty or sanction clause was detected.
description.it: E stata rilevata una clausola su penali o sanzioni.
description.fr: Une clause de penalite ou de sanction a ete detectee.

mitigation.ru: Проверьте лимиты и условия применения штрафа.
mitigation.en: Verify caps and trigger conditions for penalties.
mitigation.it: Verificare limiti e condizioni di applicazione della penale.
mitigation.fr: Verifier les plafonds et conditions de declenchement des penalites.

description.en: A liquidated damages obligation was detected.
description.it: E stato rilevato un obbligo di danni liquidati.
description.fr: Une obligation de dommages forfaitaires a ete detectee.

mitigation.ru: Проверьте соразмерность и условия пересмотра неустойки.
mitigation.it: Convalidare proporzionalita e condizioni di rinegoziazione.
mitigation.fr: Valider la proportionnalite et les conditions de renegociation.

description.ru: Обнаружена односторонняя формулировка изменения или расторжения.
description.en: Unilateral change or termination language was detected.
description.it: E stato rilevato un linguaggio di modifica o risoluzione unilaterale.
description.fr: Un libelle de modification ou de resiliation unilaterale a ete detecte.

mitigation.en: Require bilateral approval for material changes.
mitigation.it: Richiedere approvazione bilaterale per modifiche sostanziali.
mitigation.fr: Exiger une approbation bilaterale pour les modifications substantielles.

description.it: Sono state rilevate clausole di riservatezza.
description.fr: Des dispositions de confidentialite ont ete detectees.

mitigation.ru: Проверьте срок действия и исключения по раскрытию.
mitigation.en: Confirm duration and disclosure exceptions are explicit.
mitigation.it: Confermare durata ed eccezioni alla divulgazione.
mitigation.fr: Confirmer la duree et les exceptions de divulgation.

description.en: Compensation or indemnification terms were detected.
description.it: Sono stati rilevati termini di compensazione o manleva.
description.fr: Des clauses de compensation ou d'indemnisation ont ete detectees.

mitigation.ru: Уточните лимиты ответственности и триггеры применения.
mitigation.en: Clarify liability caps and triggering events.
mitigation.it: Chiarire limiti di responsabilita ed eventi attivanti.
mitigation.fr: Preciser les plafonds de responsabilite et les evenements declencheurs.

reason.ru: Формулировка расплывчатая и зависит от будущего соглашения.
reason.en: The wording is vague and depends on future agreement.
reason.it: La formulazione e vaga e dipende da un accordo futuro.
reason.fr: La formulation est vague et depend d'un accord ulterieur.

consequence.ru: Возможны споры из-за отсутствия четких критериев исполнения.
consequence.en: Execution disputes may arise due to undefined criteria.
consequence.it: Possono emergere controversie per criteri non definiti.
consequence.fr: Des litiges d'execution peuvent survenir faute de criteres definis.

reason.en: A discretionary right of one party is present.
reason.it: E presente un diritto discrezionale di una parte.
reason.fr: Un droit discretionnaire d'une partie est present.

consequence.ru: Риск разногласий при толковании или одностороннем применении.
consequence.en: There is a risk of interpretation conflict or unilateral use.
consequence.it: Esiste rischio di conflitto interpretativo o uso unilaterale.
consequence.fr: Risque de conflit d'interpretation ou d'usage unilateral.

reason.ru: Есть субъективный срок без точной границы.
reason.en: A subjective timeline term is used without precise limits.
reason.it: E usato un termine temporale soggettivo senza limiti precisi.
reason.fr: Un delai subjectif est utilise sans limites precises.

consequence.ru: Возможен спор по срокам и моменту надлежащего исполнения.
consequence.en: Timeline disputes may arise about proper performance timing.
consequence.it: Possono nascere controversie sui tempi di adempimento.
consequence.fr: Des litiges peuvent survenir sur les delais d'execution.

risk_title.ru: Низкий риск: явные маркеры не обнаружены
risk_title.en: Low risk: no explicit markers detected
risk_title.it: Rischio basso: nessun marcatore esplicito rilevato
risk_title.fr: Risque faible: aucun marqueur explicite detecte

risk_description.ru: Конфигурируемый сканер не нашел явных высокорисковых паттернов.
risk_description.en: The configurable scanner did not detect explicit high-risk patterns.
risk_description.it: Lo scanner configurabile non ha rilevato pattern ad alto rischio espliciti.
risk_description.fr: Le scanner configurable n'a pas detecte de motifs explicites a haut risque.

role_relevance.it: Output di base per il ruolo '{role}'.
role_relevance.fr: Sortie de base pour le role '{role}'.

mitigation.ru: Включите расширенную NLP/LLM модель на следующем этапе при необходимости.
mitigation.en: Enable advanced NLP/LLM model in the next stage when needed.
mitigation.it: Abilitare un modello NLP/LLM avanzato nella fase successiva se necessario.
mitigation.fr: Activer un modele NLP/LLM avance a l'etape suivante si necessaire.

dispute_reason.ru: Явные маркеры спорных формулировок не обнаружены.
dispute_reason.en: No explicit dispute markers were found.
dispute_reason.it: Nessun marcatore di controversia esplicito e stato rilevato.
dispute_reason.fr: Aucun marqueur explicite de litige n'a ete detecte.

dispute_consequence.ru: Скрытые спорные моменты требуют дополнительной юридической проверки.
dispute_consequence.en: Hidden dispute points may still require additional legal review.
dispute_consequence.it: Punti controversi nascosti possono richiedere ulteriore revisione legale.
dispute_consequence.fr: Des points litigieux caches peuvent necessiter une revue juridique supplementaire.

overview_templates.ru: Договор содержит {clauses_count} пунктов и {risks_count} обнаруженных рисков. Фокус краткого вывода смещен на роль '{role}'.
overview_templates.en: The contract contains {clauses_count} clauses and {risks_count} identified risks. The summary is focused on role '{role}'.
overview_templates.it: Il contratto contiene {clauses_count} clausole e {risks_count} rischi identificati. Il riepilogo e focalizzato sul ruolo '{role}'.
overview_templates.fr: Le contrat contient {clauses_count} clauses et {risks_count} risques identifies. Le resume est axe sur le role '{role}'.

must_do.en: Configured extractor found no explicit obligations.
must_do.it: L'estrattore configurato non ha rilevato obblighi espliciti.
must_do.fr: L'extracteur configure n'a detecte aucune obligation explicite.

should_review.ru: Конфиг не выявил явных дискреционных условий.
should_review.en: Configured extractor found no explicit discretionary terms.
should_review.it: L'estrattore configurato non ha rilevato termini discrezionali espliciti.
should_review.fr: L'extracteur configure n'a detecte aucun terme discretionnaire explicite.

payment_terms.ru: Конфиг не выявил явных условий оплаты.
payment_terms.en: Configured extractor found no explicit payment terms.
payment_terms.it: L'estrattore configurato non ha rilevato termini di pagamento espliciti.
payment_terms.fr: L'extracteur configure n'a detecte aucune condition de paiement explicite.

deadlines.en: Configured extractor found no explicit deadlines.
deadlines.it: L'estrattore configurato non ha rilevato scadenze esplicite.
deadlines.fr: L'extracteur configure n'a detecte aucun delai explicite.

penalties.ru: Конфиг не выявил явных штрафных санкций.
penalties.en: Configured extractor found no explicit penalties.
penalties.it: L'estrattore configurato non ha rilevato penali esplicite.
penalties.fr: L'extracteur configure n'a detecte aucune penalite explicite.
